projectDescription: A faith-driven non-profit led by Skipper Nyongesa that delivers leadership training, motivational speaking, and mentorship across Kenya's schools and communities.
keyFeatures: Student Leadership Training for school presidents, prefects, and student councils
Motivational Speaking — assemblies, workshops, and keynote addresses
Mentorship Programs — one-on-one and group mentorship
Teacher Development Workshops for educators and administrators
Community Outreach — faith-based talks, youth forums, and empowerment sessions
Session Booking via contact form and WhatsApp
Donation and sponsorship options (workshops, student sponsorships, partnerships)
publicApiSurface: Gallery of training sessions and school visits
